records.ety: [F. envisager; pref. en- (L. in) + visage face, visage. See Visage.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Envisaged (?; 48); p. pr. & vb. n. Envisaging (?).]

defs: To look in the face of; to apprehend; to regard.
quotes: From the very dawn of existence the infant must envisage self, and body acting on self.
